dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, your push to {quest_action} stirred them up. {quest_threat_animate_The} {quest_threat_animate_has} tightened their grip on {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} managed to get a message from {quest_stakes_human_the}: they are alive but desperate. The {enemy_type_plural} have reinforced their positions {location_hint}. We need to fight through before it is too late.
dialogueChunks.outro: We are so close. Kill every one of them standing in your way: do not let them slip away now.

dialogueChunks.intro: Things have gotten worse since you began to {quest_action}, {player_name}. {quest_threat_animate_The} retaliated against {quest_stakes_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} reports that the {enemy_type_plural} moved {quest_stakes_the} deeper toward {quest_focus_the}. They left a rear guard {location_hint} to slow any pursuit. Cut through them before the main force escapes.
dialogueChunks.outro: This is their last move. Destroy the rear guard and push through to the captives.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I have grim news. Your work to {quest_action} revealed that {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_is} not the only danger at {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type_plural} are using the area {location_hint} as a staging ground. {quest_ally} believes they plan to move {quest_stakes_the} permanently unless we act now. Scatter their forces and create an opening for the rescue.
dialogueChunks.outro: This may be our last chance. Wipe out every {enemy_type} at the staging ground before they can regroup.

dialogueChunks.intro: The trail {location_hint} is more dangerous than we expected. {enemy_type_plural} patrols are everywhere, and they have set traps along the path.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: You will need to fight through their scouts before reaching {quest_focus_the}. {quest_ally} warned that {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_is} growing stronger the closer you get to their territory.
dialogueChunks.outro: Clear the way and press forward. Kill every patrol you encounter: every moment wasted is another moment {quest_focus_the} remains in danger.

dialogueChunks.intro: You have found signs of {quest_threat_the} {location_hint}. Discarded supplies and cold fire pits mark where they rested with their prisoners.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The captors split into groups here. A rearguard of {enemy_type_plural} stayed behind to cover the retreat. They are still camped in the area, and they will raise the alarm if they spot you.
dialogueChunks.outro: Wipe out the stragglers before they can warn the others. Once the camp is clear, we can pick up the trail again.

dialogueChunks.intro: Something does not add up. The {enemy_type_plural} knew too much about {quest_focus_the}: patrol schedules, weak points, who to target. Someone from the inside fed them information.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Talk to {target_npc}. They were the last person to see {quest_focus_the} before {quest_threat_animate_the} struck. Whether they are guilty or simply the last witness, their account matters.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need the truth before {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} lost forever. Find {target_npc} and get them to tell you everything they know.
